scripts.install-all: rm -rf /tmp/.junk && rm -f {auth,custom-gatherer-puppeteer,integration-test,type-checking}/pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm -C auth/ install --ignore-workspace --store-dir /tmp/.junk && pnpm -C integration-test/ install --ignore-workspace --store-dir /tmp/.junk && pnpm -C custom-gatherer-puppeteer/ install --ignore-workspace --store-dir /tmp/.junk && pnpm -C type-checking/ install --ignore-workspace --store-dir /tmp/.junk
